artifact_policy.comparison_runtime: Hugging Face tokenizers JSON loaded directly by tokenizers.Tokenizer

selection_rule.larger_vocabulary_promotion: Relative to the smallest eligible vocabulary: improve both Japanese and English tokens/byte by at least 5%, improve at least one by 10%, and keep median bytes/s within the smaller candidate's five-pass observed range.
selection_rule.tie_break: Select the smaller vocabulary when no larger candidate clears every promotion threshold.

candidates.exclusion: The exact revision declares MIT in README metadata and links the generic MIT text, but contains no repository-owned LICENSE file or tokenizer-specific redistribution notice. The predeclared redistribution/license-file gate therefore excludes it; no SentencePiece runtime or tokenizer artifact was added solely for this candidate.

malformed.policy: Malformed UTF-8 bytes must fail strict UTF-8 decoding before tokenization; surrogate code points must be rejected by the tokenizer boundary.
